action.thought:
The main config.cmake at /workspace/YatCC/config.cmake sets `TASK1_WITH "antlr"`. The local config.cmake at /workspace/YatCC/task/1/config.cmake also sets it. But the main one is processed first. Let me check how the CMakeLists.txt hierarchy works.

Looking at the task/1/CMakeLists.txt:
```
include(config.cmake)
if(TASK1_WITH STREQUAL "flex")
  ...
elseif(TASK1_WITH STREQUAL "antlr")
  ...
```

The task/1/config.cmake sets `set(TASK1_WITH antlr)`, which overrides whatever was set in the main config.cmake. So I need to change the task/1/config.cmake to use flex.

Wait, I already changed it! Let me check again...

Actually, I see the issue. The build system is still building the antlr version because the CMake cache was already configured with antlr. I need to reconfigure CMake after changing the config.

Let me delete the build directory and reconfigure.
